description_long: This is a robust, cylindrical plant pot with a slightly flared rim and base, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The exterior is predominantly dark, mottled with brownish and black weathered textures, suggesting it is made of metal or a similarly durable material. On one side, there is a prominent, bright green graphic of a stylized, spiky-faced emblem, adding a unique and urban decorative touch. The interior appears hollow and deep, suitable for holding soil and a medium-sized plant. The surface finish is matte and rough, with visible signs of wear and exposure to the elements. There are no visible handles, drainage holes, or additional features beyond the main receptacle body.
description: A dark, weathered metal plant pot with a flared rim and base, featuring a bright green spiky-faced emblem on one side. The surface is rough and matte, giving it an industrial, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the green spiky-faced emblem clearly on the dark, weathered surface.
description_view_1: Side view with the emblem partially visible, revealing more of the pot's cylindrical shape and texture.
description_view_2: Rear view with no emblem, highlighting the mottled, worn surface and the pot's flared base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, fully plain with only the dark, weathered texture visible.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in urban streetscapes or public parks for decorative planting
